title: Hegseth warns NATO allies that some nations will 'fail' U.S. defense review
summary_full: The U.S. defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.
summary_public: The U.S. defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: access to bases to strike Iran
